abilities.description: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token, then mill a card. If an Insect card was milled this way, put a loyalty counter on NICKNAME and repeat this process.

effect.description: Create a 1/1 black and green Insect creature token, then mill a card. If an Insect card was milled this way, put a loyalty counter on NICKNAME and repeat this process.
effect.name: Repeat

abilities.description: You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, destroy target creature or planeswalker.

effect.description: You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, destroy target creature or planeswalker.
effect.name: ImmediateTrigger

abilities.description: Each opponent loses life equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

statics.description: As long as CARDNAME isn't on the battlefield, it's a 1/1 Insect creature in addition to its other types.
